steps.text: Hiding a tool removes it from agent access without deleting any configuration — masking rules, mappers, and guardrails all stay intact. Useful for dangerous operations, deprecated tools, or anything you're still testing.

Click the eye icon on any tool card to toggle visibility. When hidden, the card grays out and shows a 'Hidden' badge; agents calling it get a clean METHOD_NOT_FOUND error, as if the tool didn't exist. Click again to restore — toggling is instant.
